name: Brown Sugar Apple Pie - Butter Busters^
recipeIngredient: 6 cups Thinly sliced peeled tart apples
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix all crust ingredients well.
2. Divide dough into two halves and roll out each to make top and bottom crusts.
3. Preheat oven to 425°F.
4. In a large bowl, mix sugars, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, and lite salt (if using).
5. Add apples and toss to combine with the sugar mixture.
6. Place apple filling into the pie crust.
7. Sprinkle grated lemon peel over the top.
8. Drizzle liquid butter buds over the top.
9. Fold the top crust into quarters and carefully place it so the point is at the center, then unfold.
10. Trim the overhang 1 inch all around with scissors.
11. Moisten the edge of the bottom pastry with a little water.
12. Fold the top pastry under the edge of the bottom pastry.
13. Press edges together with fingers to seal.
14. Press upright to form a rim, then crimp by pinching with the thumb at an angle all around the pie.
15. Brush the crust with egg beaters mixed with 1 tablespoon water.
16. Make slits in the top for ventilation.
17. Bake for 45-50 minutes or until the crust is golden brown. Wrap foil over the edges for the first 35 minutes to prevent burning.
Nutritional Information:
Per serving: 280 calories, 1g fat (3%), 0mg cholesterol, 3g fiber, 5g protein, 64g carbohydrates, 138mg sodium
Serving from S&L: 232 calories, 51g carbohydrates
